skills.name: Outbound Prospecting & Lead Generation
skills.description: Generating new business pipeline through proactive outreach — cold calling, email sequences, LinkedIn engagement, and social selling. Identifying target accounts, researching decision-makers, and initiating conversations that create qualified opportunities.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Can execute basic cold outreach using scripts and templates. Understands the concept of prospecting sequences and lead qualification criteria.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Builds and manages multi-channel outbound campaigns independently. Personalizes messaging based on account research. Consistently meets activity and pipeline targets. Uses AI tools to enhance outreach quality and volume.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs outbound strategy for teams including targeting, messaging, sequencing, and channel optimization. Builds AI-powered prospecting workflows. Coaches others on effective prospecting techniques and continuously optimizes conversion rates.

skills.name: Lead Qualification & Discovery
skills.description: Assessing prospect fit and readiness through structured discovery conversations. Applying frameworks (BANT, MEDDPICC) to determine budget, authority, need, and timeline. Converting initial interest into qualified, sales-ready opportunities.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Can conduct basic qualification calls using a script. Understands BANT criteria and can assess basic fit.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Leads structured discovery conversations independently. Uncovers pain points, identifies stakeholders, and assesses deal potential. Applies qualification frameworks consistently and produces quality handoff briefs for sales.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs qualification processes and frameworks for teams. Trains others on discovery methodology. Optimizes qualification criteria based on win/loss analysis and pipeline data. Adapts approach for complex enterprise buying committees.

skills.name: CRM Management & Sales Operations
skills.description: Managing customer and prospect data in CRM systems (Salesforce, HubSpot). Maintaining accurate pipeline records, tracking activities, managing deal stages, and producing forecasts and reports that support data-driven sales decisions.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Can log activities, update contact records, and navigate CRM interfaces. Understands basic pipeline stages and reporting.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Manages a well-organized pipeline with accurate data. Creates reports and dashboards. Uses CRM data to prioritize activities and inform strategy. Maintains forecasting discipline.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs CRM workflows, lead scoring models, and automation. Builds advanced reports and forecasting models. Ensures CRM discipline across teams and uses data to optimize sales processes and conversion rates.

skills.name: Sales Engagement & Outreach Tools
skills.description: Proficiency in sales engagement platforms (Outreach, Salesloft) and prospecting tools (LinkedIn Sales Navigator, ZoomInfo, Clay). Building automated sequences, tracking engagement, and leveraging data to optimize outreach effectiveness.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Can use basic features of sales engagement platforms — sending sequences, tracking opens and replies. Familiar with LinkedIn Sales Navigator for basic prospect research.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Builds and optimizes multi-step outreach sequences across channels. Uses prospecting data platforms effectively for account research and contact enrichment. Analyzes engagement metrics to improve performance.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs and optimizes the sales tech stack for teams. Builds AI-enhanced prospecting workflows. Evaluates and implements new tools. Sets best practices for tool usage and trains team members.

skills.name: Partnership Development & Ecosystem Building
skills.description: Identifying, recruiting, and onboarding partners — channel partners, technology alliances, affiliates, and strategic integrators. Building partner ecosystems that create mutual value, accelerate market penetration, and drive revenue through collaborative go-to-market motions.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Understands different partnership models (channel, technology, affiliate, strategic). Can support partner onboarding and maintain basic partner relationships.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Identifies and recruits new partners independently. Develops partner value propositions and manages the onboarding lifecycle. Builds relationships with partner stakeholders and coordinates joint activities.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs and scales partner ecosystems globally. Creates partner program frameworks including tiers, incentives, and enablement. Recruits strategic partners that significantly accelerate market expansion and revenue growth.

skills.name: Partner Relationship Management
skills.description: Managing ongoing relationships with partners across commercial, technical, and operational dimensions. Ensuring partner satisfaction, maximizing mutual value, conducting business reviews, and driving partner-led revenue growth through proactive engagement.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Manages basic partner communications and coordinates logistics. Can track partner activities and maintain relationship records.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Manages a portfolio of partners end-to-end. Conducts quarterly business reviews. Identifies upsell and expansion opportunities. Resolves partner issues and advocates for partner needs internally.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Manages strategic, enterprise-level partnerships with executive engagement. Develops comprehensive joint business plans. Drives significant revenue through partner channels. Influences partner strategy at the organizational level.

skills.name: Joint Business Planning & Co-Selling
skills.description: Creating and executing joint business plans with partners — aligning on goals, defining co-selling motions, building pipeline together, and tracking mutual performance. Driving revenue through collaborative go-to-market initiatives.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Understands the concept of joint business plans and co-selling. Can support execution of existing partner plans.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Develops and executes joint business plans with partners. Coordinates co-selling activities and tracks pipeline contribution. Aligns internal and partner teams on shared objectives.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Creates comprehensive partner go-to-market strategies at scale. Builds co-selling frameworks and partner revenue models. Manages complex multi-partner initiatives and drives executive alignment across organizations.

skills.name: Partner Enablement & Program Management
skills.description: Building and managing partner enablement programs — sales training, technical positioning, certification, and playbooks that empower partners to effectively position and sell the company's solutions. Designing partner program structures with tiers, incentives, and performance metrics.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Can deliver basic product training to partners. Understands partner program structures and incentive models.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Develops partner enablement materials including sales playbooks, technical guides, and training programs. Manages partner program operations and tracks partner performance metrics.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs and scales global partner enablement programs. Creates partner program frameworks with tiered structures, certification paths, and incentive models. Builds self-service enablement platforms and measures program ROI.

skills.name: Commercial Negotiation & Deal Structuring
skills.description: Negotiating commercial terms, pricing, contracts, and partnership agreements. Structuring deals that balance company objectives with partner/customer needs. Managing the legal and financial aspects of business agreements.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Understands basic commercial terms and contract structures. Can participate in negotiation discussions with guidance.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Leads negotiations independently for standard deals. Structures commercial proposals with pricing models and terms. Navigates legal and financial review processes. Knows when to escalate complex terms.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Negotiates complex, high-value, multi-stakeholder deals. Structures creative commercial frameworks that drive mutual value. Manages enterprise-level contract negotiations with C-suite counterparts. Develops negotiation playbooks for teams.

skills.name: Market Research & Competitive Intelligence (BD)
skills.description: Researching markets, industries, competitors, and target accounts to identify business opportunities and inform BD strategy. Gathering intelligence on market trends, competitive landscape, and customer needs to support data-driven decision-making.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Can research individual accounts and prospects using available tools. Understands basic competitive landscape.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Conducts structured market research to identify new opportunities and segments. Analyzes competitive positioning and market trends. Uses insights to prioritize outreach and inform messaging.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Builds comprehensive market intelligence programs. Identifies emerging market opportunities and new verticals. Influences product and GTM strategy through market insights. Presents market analysis to executive leadership.

skills.name: Pipeline Management & Forecasting
skills.description: Building, managing, and reporting on sales/BD pipeline. Tracking opportunities through stages, maintaining forecast accuracy, analyzing conversion rates, and ensuring consistent pipeline coverage to meet revenue targets.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Can track opportunities in CRM and provide basic pipeline updates. Understands pipeline stages and metrics.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Manages a well-qualified pipeline with consistent coverage ratios. Provides accurate forecasts. Analyzes pipeline velocity and conversion rates to identify bottlenecks and opportunities.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs pipeline management processes and forecasting models for teams. Builds predictable revenue engines. Coaches teams on pipeline discipline. Presents board-level pipeline and revenue forecasts.

skills.name: Relationship Building & Stakeholder Engagement
skills.description: Building and maintaining strong professional relationships with prospects, partners, customers, and internal stakeholders. Establishing trust, credibility, and rapport that drives long-term business value. Engaging stakeholders at all levels including C-suite executives.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Builds rapport with peers and mid-level contacts. Maintains consistent communication and follow-through.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Develops trusted relationships with senior stakeholders and decision-makers. Navigates complex organizational structures. Maintains a network of valuable professional contacts.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Builds and maintains executive-level relationships across organizations globally. Acts as a trusted advisor to C-suite leaders. Leverages a deep professional network to create business opportunities and strategic value.

skills.name: Presentation & Business Storytelling
skills.description: Delivering compelling presentations, product demos, and business proposals to prospects, partners, and stakeholders. Crafting persuasive narratives that connect product value to business outcomes. Adapting communication style for different audiences.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Can deliver basic product presentations using prepared materials. Communicates clearly in meetings and calls.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Creates and delivers tailored presentations to senior stakeholders. Builds compelling business cases and proposals. Adapts messaging effectively for different audiences and personas.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Delivers executive-level presentations to C-suite, boards, and large audiences. Crafts strategic narratives that influence major business decisions. Represents the company at industry conferences and high-stakes customer engagements.

skills.name: BD/SDR Team Leadership
skills.description: Building, managing, and scaling business development or sales development teams. Includes hiring, coaching, performance management, quota-setting, compensation design, and building career development paths for BD/SDR professionals.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Mentors peers informally. Can support onboarding of new team members.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Manages a small BD/SDR team. Conducts coaching sessions, pipeline reviews, and 1:1s. Hires and onboards new team members. Sets and tracks team performance metrics.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Builds and scales global BD/SDR organizations. Designs compensation plans, performance management systems, and career frameworks. Recruits and develops top talent. Creates high-performance team cultures with clear accountability.

skills.name: Channel & Alliance Strategy
skills.description: Designing and executing channel sales strategies and technology alliance programs. Building indirect sales motions through partners, distributors, and resellers. Understanding channel economics, partner program design, and ecosystem dynamics.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Understands channel sales models and partner program basics. Can support channel activities and partner coordination.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Develops and executes channel strategies for specific regions or segments. Recruits and activates channel partners. Manages partner pipeline and tracks channel contribution to revenue.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs global channel and alliance strategies. Creates partner program frameworks with tiered structures and incentives. Builds strategic alliances with major technology vendors. Drives significant revenue through indirect sales channels.

skills.name: AI-Powered Sales & Prospecting
skills.description: Leveraging AI tools and automation for sales development workflows — personalized outbound at scale, prospect research enrichment, automated sequencing, intent-based targeting, and AI-assisted lead scoring. Understanding how to integrate AI into the BD process effectively.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Aware of AI sales tools and has experimented with basic AI-assisted outreach or research.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Actively uses AI tools in daily BD workflow — personalized email generation, prospect enrichment, intent-based targeting. Understands how to combine AI outputs with human judgment for effective outreach.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Builds AI-powered BD pipelines and workflows. Evaluates and implements AI tools for teams. Designs AI-enhanced prospecting strategies that significantly increase pipeline quality and efficiency. Establishes best practices for responsible AI use in sales.

skills.name: Go-to-Market Strategy
skills.description: Developing and executing go-to-market plans for products, services, or market segments. Defining target markets, positioning, pricing, channel strategy, and launch execution. Aligning BD activities with broader company GTM objectives.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Understands GTM concepts and can support execution of existing GTM plans. Aware of how BD fits into broader go-to-market strategy.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Contributes to GTM strategy development for specific segments or regions. Aligns BD activities with GTM objectives. Provides market feedback that informs positioning and messaging.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs comprehensive GTM strategies for new markets, products, or segments. Aligns cross-functional teams (sales, marketing, product, partnerships) around GTM execution. Drives market entry and expansion strategies globally.

skills.name: Ecosystem & Community Development
skills.description: Building and nurturing ecosystems of partners, investors, accelerators, community stakeholders, and industry participants. Creating programs and initiatives that establish the company as a central player in its market ecosystem.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Understands ecosystem dynamics and can participate in community events and partner activities.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Builds relationships within target ecosystems (VCs, accelerators, industry groups). Represents the company at events and develops community engagement programs.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs and scales ecosystem strategies that establish the company as a market leader. Builds deep relationships across investor, partner, and community networks. Creates scalable programs (credits, workshops, events) that drive adoption and brand authority.
